questions.question:
다음 밑줄 친 부분의 뜻으로 가장 적절한 것을 고르시오.
For children, it is important to encourage good behavior.

다음 밑줄 친 부분의 뜻으로 가장 적절한 것을 고르시오.
She had to put off the trip because of heavy rain.

다음 밑줄 친 부분의 뜻으로 가장 적절한 것을 고르시오.
Many online lessons are free of charge. Besides, you can
watch them anytime and anywhere.

다음 밑줄 친 두 단어의 의미 관계와 다른 것은?
While some people say that a glass is half full, others
say that it’s half empty.
다음 포스터에서 언급되지 않은 것은?

다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것을 고르시오.
◦ When you 	the train, make sure you take all
your belongings.
◦ Please 	the book on the table after reading it.

다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것을 고르시오.
◦ Minsu, 	are you going to do this weekend?
◦ No one knows exactly 	happened.

다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것을 고르시오.
◦ Dad’s heart is filled 	love for me.
◦ Alice was satisfied 	her performance.

다음 대화에서 밑줄 친 표현의 의미로 가장 적절한 것은?
A : What are you doing, Junho?
B : I’m trying to solve this math problem, but it’s too
difficult for me.
A : Let’s try to figure it out together.
B : That’s a good idea. Two heads are better than one.
choices: ① 수고 없이 얻는 것은 없다.
② 사공이 많으면 배가 산으로 간다.
③ 겉모습만으로 사람을 판단해서는 안 된다.
④ 혼자보다 두 명이 함께 생각하는 것이 낫다.

questions.question:
다음 대화에서 알 수 있는 B의 심정으로 가장 적절한 것은?
A : Did you get the results for the English speech contest?
B : Yeah, I just got them.
A : So, how did you do?
B : I won first prize. It’s the happiest day of my life.

다음 대화가 이루어지는 장소로 가장 적절한 것은?
A : Good morning. How may I help you?
B : Hi, I’d like to open a bank account.
A : All right. Please fill out this form.
B : Thanks. I’ll do it now.

다음 글에서 밑줄 친 It이 가리키는 것으로 가장 적절한 것은?
One day, Michael saw an advertisement for a reporter
in the local newspaper. It was a job he’d always dreamed
of. So he made up his mind to apply for the job.

다음 대화의 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것을 고르시오.
A : 	?
B : I’m going to teach Korean to foreigners.
A : Great. Remember you should volunteer with a good heart.
B : I’ll keep that in mind.
choices: ② What did you do last Friday
③ What do you think about Korean food
④ What kind of volunteer work are you going to do

questions.question:
다음 대화의 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것을 고르시오.
A : Have you decided which club you’re going to join
this year?
B : 	.
choices: ① I left Korea for Canada
② I went to see a doctor yesterday
③ I’ve decided to join the dance club
④ I had spaghetti for dinner last night

questions.question:
다음 대화의 주제로 가장 적절한 것은?
A : Doctor, my eyes are tired from working on the
computer all day. What can I do to look after my eyes?
B : Make sure you have enough sleep to rest your eyes.
A : Okay. Then what else can you recommend?
B : Eat fruits and vegetables that have lots of vitamins.
choices: ④ 시력 회복에 도움 되는 운동

questions.question:
다음 글을 쓴 목적으로 가장 적절한 것은?
This is an announcement from the management office.
As you were informed yesterday, the electricity will be
cut this afternoon from 1 p.m. to 2 p.m. We’re sorry for
any inconvenience. Thank you for your understanding.
다음 박물관에 대한 안내문의 내용과 일치하지 않는 것은?

다음 2022 Science Presentation Contest에 대한 설명과
일치하지 않는 것은?
The 2022 Science Presentation Contest will be held on
May 20, 2022. The topic is global warming. Contestants
can 	participate 	in 	the 	contest 	only 	as 	individuals.
Presentations should not be longer than 10 minutes. For
more information, see Mr. Lee at the teachers’ office.
choices: ④ 발표 시간은 10분을 넘지 않아야 한다.

questions.question:
다음 글의 주제로 가장 적절한 것은?
I’d like to tell you about appropriate actions to take
in emergency situations. First, when there is a fire, use
the stairs instead of taking the elevator. Second, in the
case of an earthquake, go to an open area and stay
away from tall buildings because they may fall on you.
choices: ④ 비상사태 발생 시 대처 방법

questions.question:
다음 글의 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것을 고르시오.
These 	days, 	many 	people 	make 	reservations 	at
restaurants and never show up. Here are some tips for
restaurants to reduce no-show customers. First, ask for
a deposit. If the customers don’t show up, they’ll lose
their money. Second, call the customer the day before to
the reservation.

다음 글의 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것을 고르시오.
Weather forecasters 	the amount of rain,
wind speeds, and paths of storms. In order to do so,
they 	observe 	the 	weather 	conditions 	and 	use 	their
knowledge 	of 	weather 	patterns. 	Based 	on 	current
evidence 	and 	past 	experience, 	they 	decide 	what 	the
weather will be like.

글의 흐름으로 보아 다음 문장이 들어가기에 가장 적절한 곳은?
To 	overcome 	this 	problem, 	soap 	can 	be 	made 	by
volunteer groups and donated to the countries that need it.
( ① ) Washing your hands with soap helps prevent
the 	spread 	of 	disease. 	( ② ) 	In 	fact, 	in 	West 	and
Central Africa alone, washing hands with soap could
save 	about 	half 	a 	million 	lives 	each 	year. 	( ③ ) 
However, the problem is that soap is expensive in this
region. ( ④ ) This way, we can help save more lives.
choices: (1) Washing your hands with soap helps prevent the spread of disease.
(2) In fact, in West and Central Africa alone, washing hands with soap could save about half a million lives each year.
(3) However, the problem is that soap is expensive in this region.
(4) This way, we can help save more lives.

questions.question:
다음 글의 바로 뒤에 이어질 내용으로 가장 적절한 것은?
In the future, many countries will have the problem of
aging populations. We will have more and more old
people. This means jobs related to the aging population
will be in demand. So when you’re thinking of a job,
you should consider this change. Now, I’ll recommend
some job choices for a time of aging populations.

윗글의 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것은?
Do you know flowers provide us with many health
benefits? For example, the smell of roses can help
stress levels. Another example is lavender. Lavender is
known to be helpful if you have trouble sleeping. These
are just two examples of how flowers help with our health.

윗글의 주제로 가장 적절한 것은?
Do you know flowers provide us with many health
benefits? For example, the smell of roses can help
stress levels. Another example is lavender. Lavender is
known to be helpful if you have trouble sleeping. These
are just two examples of how flowers help with our health.
